conference_sessions.title: Welcome Plenary: Building Stronger Teacher Networks
conference_sessions.description: An opening plenary on how regional and online teacher networks can support professional growth across career stages.

conference_sessions.title: Supporting New Teachers in Their First Three Years
conference_sessions.description: Research-based strategies and community structures that help early-career teachers thrive.

conference_sessions.title: Culturally Responsive Classroom Management
conference_sessions.description: Explore classroom management approaches that center students’ identities and cultures.

conference_sessions.title: Math Talk Routines for Elementary Classrooms
conference_sessions.description: Practical routines that increase discourse and reasoning in K–5 math lessons.

conference_sessions.title: Opening Keynote: Reimagining STEM Equity
conference_sessions.description: A keynote exploring how technology and community partnerships can expand equitable access to STEM learning.

conference_sessions.title: Blended Learning with Low-Cost Tech
conference_sessions.description: Design engaging blended learning experiences using devices and tools you already have.

conference_sessions.title: Formative Assessment in the Digital Classroom
conference_sessions.description: Use digital tools to quickly check for understanding and adapt instruction in real time.

conference_sessions.title: Project-Based Learning for High School Science
conference_sessions.description: Plan standards-aligned science projects that connect to local community issues.

conference_sessions.title: Supporting New Teachers Through Mentoring
conference_sessions.description: Structures, protocols, and tools for effective mentor-mentee relationships.

conference_sessions.title: Inclusive Tech Tools for Diverse Learners
conference_sessions.description: Hands-on exploration of free and low-cost tech tools to support UDL and accessibility.

conference_sessions.title: Student Voice in High School Advisory Programs
conference_sessions.description: Learn structures that center student leadership in advisory and homeroom programs.

conference_sessions.title: Designing Inclusive IEP Meetings with Families
conference_sessions.description: Strategies for making IEP meetings collaborative and student-centered.

conference_sessions.title: Math Reasoning Routines for Middle School
conference_sessions.description: High-leverage routines that build deep conceptual understanding in grades 6–8.

conference_sessions.title: Using Data Teams to Improve Instruction
conference_sessions.description: Collaborative data inquiry cycles for school-based teams.

conference_sessions.title: Closing Panel: Sustaining Professional Learning Communities
conference_sessions.description: Panel of teachers discussing how to sustain PLCs over time.

grants.title: K–5 STEM Classroom Mini-Grant
grants.description: Supports classroom-based STEM projects, materials, and field experiences for elementary students.

grants.title: Elementary Robotics Starter Kits Grant
grants.description: Provides funding for K–5 educators to purchase introductory robotics kits and curriculum.

grants.title: Inquiry Science Materials for K–5 Classrooms
grants.description: Funding for hands-on science materials that support inquiry-based learning in elementary grades.

grants.title: Outdoor STEM Learning Micro-Grants
grants.description: Supports outdoor STEM learning projects such as school gardens, weather stations, and local ecology investigations.

grants.title: Middle School Engineering Design Challenge Grants
grants.description: Funds materials and community partnerships for engineering design challenges in grades 6–8.

grants.title: High School Advanced STEM Lab Grant
grants.description: Supports the creation or expansion of advanced STEM laboratory spaces for high school students.

grants.title: All Grades STEM Innovation Grant
grants.description: Funds innovative STEM projects that span multiple grade levels or involve cross-school collaboration.

grants.title: K–5 Literacy and Family Engagement Grant
grants.description: Supports literacy nights, home reading libraries, and family workshops in elementary schools.

grants.title: Classroom Environment & Management Mini-Grants
grants.description: Funds flexible seating, calming corners, and other classroom environment projects.

grants.title: Formative Assessment for Learning Grant
grants.description: Supports the adoption of formative assessment tools and professional learning across a school.

grants.title: Inclusive Education Innovation Grant
grants.description: Funds projects that remove barriers and increase access for students with disabilities and multilingual learners.

mentors.bio: Alicia is a National Board Certified science teacher with 14 years of experience in middle and high school physics and chemistry. She specializes in inquiry-based labs and culturally responsive STEM teaching.
Marcus teaches 8th grade integrated science and coaches new teachers on using phenomena-based instruction.
Elena is a middle school math coach focusing on problem-based learning and multilingual learners.
High school English teacher and department chair with a passion for project-based learning and student voice.
STEM instructional coach supporting K–8 teachers with integrated STEM units and robotics.
Elementary teacher specializing in trauma-informed classroom management and social-emotional learning.
High school biology teacher who mentors new teachers in designing NGSS-aligned units and assessments.
International school special educator focusing on inclusive practices and co-teaching models.
District-wide instructional coach specializing in formative assessment and data-driven instruction.
Induction coach working with first- and second-year teachers on planning, management, and work-life balance.
Instructional technology coach helping teachers integrate devices and apps in meaningful ways.
Rural educator and mentor supporting multigrade teaching and community partnerships.

programs.title: Online Math Intervention Certification
programs.description: A 10-week certification focused on designing and implementing effective math intervention for diverse learners.

programs.title: Inclusive Education Specialist Certification
programs.description: Develop deep expertise in inclusive practices, co-teaching, and collaboration with support staff and families.

programs.title: Formative Assessment and Feedback Certification
programs.description: An 8-week program on designing and using formative assessments to drive instruction.

programs.title: Foundations of Inclusive Education
programs.description: Explore core concepts of inclusive education, universal design for learning, and collaborative planning.

programs.title: Co-Teaching Strategies for Inclusive Classrooms
programs.description: Practical models and routines for co-planning and co-teaching in inclusive settings.

programs.title: Designing Accessible Digital Materials
programs.description: Learn to create accessible slides, documents, and videos that meet diverse learner needs.

programs.title: Assessment Strategies for Everyday Instruction
programs.description: Integrate quick checks, exit tickets, and student self-assessment into your daily lessons.

programs.title: Positive Classroom Management for New Teachers
programs.description: Evidence-based routines and relationship-building strategies for the first years of teaching.

programs.title: Integrating STEM in Elementary Classrooms
programs.description: Plan interdisciplinary STEM units that connect science, math, and engineering practices.

programs.title: Micro-Credential: Culturally Responsive Pedagogy
programs.description: Demonstrate competency in culturally responsive teaching through artifacts and reflection.

programs.title: One-Day Workshop: Rich Tasks in Middle School Math
programs.description: Design and facilitate rich math tasks that promote reasoning and discourse.

programs.title: Math Instructional Coach Certification
programs.description: Hybrid program for experienced teachers transitioning into math coaching roles.

programs.title: Technology Integration for Authentic Learning
programs.description: Plan technology-rich lessons that prioritize student thinking over tools.

programs.title: Teacher Wellness and Burnout Prevention
programs.description: Strategies to sustain your energy and passion for teaching.

resources.title: Five Low-Prep Routines for Calm Classroom Transitions
resources.summary: Quick, low-prep routines that help you move students between activities smoothly and reduce off-task behavior.

resources.title: Using Relationship-Building to Prevent Behavior Issues
resources.summary: Learn concrete strategies to build trust with students and prevent many behavior challenges before they start.

resources.title: A 10-Minute Reset: When Your Lesson Goes Off the Rails
resources.summary: A simple, repeatable process to reset expectations, regain student focus, and keep learning on track.

resources.title: Parking Lot, Signals, and Other Silent Management Tools
resources.summary: Silent attention cues and tools that reduce teacher talk while keeping students on task.

resources.title: Three Restorative Questions You Can Use Tomorrow
resources.summary: A short guide to using restorative questions to repair harm and keep students in the learning community.

resources.title: Classroom Management 101: The First Week of School
resources.summary: Step-by-step planning checklist for your first week systems and procedures.

resources.title: Quick-Check Assessment Strategies for Inclusive Classrooms
resources.summary: Use entrance tickets, whiteboards, and turn-and-talks to gather evidence of learning without overwhelming your planning time.

resources.title: Designing Exit Tickets That Actually Inform Instruction
resources.summary: A step-by-step guide with templates for exit tickets you can adapt for any subject or grade.

resources.title: Video: Using Rubrics for Formative Feedback
resources.summary: Watch how a middle school teacher uses simple rubrics to give students actionable feedback during a project.

resources.title: Checking for Understanding in 3 Minutes or Less
resources.summary: A menu of lightning-fast formative assessment techniques to embed into any lesson.

resources.title: What Inclusive Education Looks Like Day to Day
resources.summary: Snapshots from real classrooms showing how teachers make learning accessible to all students.

resources.title: Universal Design for Learning Classroom Toolkit
resources.summary: Templates and checklists to plan lessons using the UDL framework.

resources.title: Video: Co-Teaching in Action
resources.summary: Classroom footage and debrief highlighting effective co-teaching moves.

resources.title: Podcast: Surviving and Thriving in Your First Three Years
resources.summary: Early-career teachers share stories and strategies for managing workload and stress.

resources.title: Estrategias básicas de gestión del aula para nuevos docentes
resources.summary: Consejos rápidos y concretos para establecer rutinas y expectativas claras desde el primer día.

resources.title: Formative Assessment Strategies for Middle School Science
resources.summary: Examples of checks for understanding aligned to common middle school science phenomena.

events.title: April Problem-Solving Lab for Grades 6–8
events.description: Interactive online workshop where middle school math teachers analyze rich tasks and plan problem-solving lessons for grades 6–8.

events.title: Algebra Readiness Bootcamp (Grades 6–8)
events.description: Focus on supporting students as they transition into algebra, with strategies for reasoning about expressions and equations.

events.title: Warm-Ups That Build Number Sense in Grades 6–8
events.description: Learn quick daily warm-ups that strengthen number sense and math discourse in middle school classrooms.

events.title: Hands-On Fractions Workshop for Middle School
events.description: In-person collaborative workshop featuring manipulatives and visual models for teaching fractions and ratios.

events.title: Phenomena-Based Science for Grades 6–8
events.description: Plan NGSS-aligned units anchored in real-world phenomena to drive student inquiry.

events.title: STEM Centers in Elementary Classrooms
events.description: Strategies for organizing and managing hands-on STEM centers in K–5 settings.

events.title: Designing Inquiry-Based Tasks for Algebra II
events.description: High school math teachers collaborate to adapt traditional problem sets into inquiry-based tasks.

events.title: Classroom Management Moves for Middle School
events.description: Practical strategies for responding to challenging behaviors while preserving relationships in grades 6–8.

events.title: Planning Inclusive Lessons with UDL
events.description: Walk through a universal design for learning (UDL) planning template and adapt a current lesson for greater accessibility.

events.title: Making Formative Assessment Work in Any Subject
events.description: Learn a repeatable cycle for planning, gathering, and acting on formative assessment data.

events.title: Teacher Education Network Annual Conference 2026
events.description: Three-day hybrid conference featuring keynotes, breakout sessions, and networking events across content areas and grade levels.

events.title: Summer Institute on Project-Based Learning
events.description: Multi-day institute where cross-district teams design standards-aligned PBL units.

events.title: Midwest New Teacher Networking Night
events.description: An informal evening meet-up for early-career teachers in the Midwest to share resources and build community.

events.title: Inclusive Practices for Elementary Co-Teachers
events.description: A one-day training focused on co-teaching models and accommodations for K–5 students.

events.title: Low-Prep Tech Routines for Any Classroom
events.description: Discover a set of easy-to-implement routines for using devices without losing instructional time.

events.title: Winter Problem-Solving Lab for Grades 6–8
events.description: Previously offered online lab focusing on non-routine problems and student discourse.

event_registrations.notes: Registered as first free online middle-school math workshop for April.
Registered as second free online middle-school math workshop for April.
Cancelled due to schedule conflict with school event.

discussion_threads.title: How do you structure your first 10 minutes of class?
discussion_threads.body: I'm in my first year teaching 7th grade ELA and still tweaking my opening routines. What do your first 10 minutes look like on a typical day?

discussion_threads.title: Parent conferences when you feel nervous
discussion_threads.body: I have my first round of family conferences next week. What scripts or sentence starters help you when conversations get tense?

discussion_threads.title: Balancing grad school classes with full-time teaching
discussion_threads.body: Anyone else in a certification or master's program while teaching full-time? How do you plan your week so you don't burn out?

discussion_threads.title: Classroom jobs that actually reduce your workload
discussion_threads.body: Looking for ideas on student jobs that are manageable but genuinely helpful, especially in grades 4–8.

discussion_threads.title: What do you include in your sub plans?
discussion_threads.body: I’m trying to create a sub plan template I can reuse. What sections or details do you always include?

discussion_threads.title: When students test boundaries after a break
discussion_threads.body: My students came back from mid-winter break full of energy and pushing limits. How do you reset expectations without feeling punitive?

discussion_threads.title: Share one win from your week
discussion_threads.body: Let’s start a running thread where we share one positive moment from our classrooms each week.

discussion_threads.title: What I wish I knew before my first year (archive)
discussion_threads.body: Older thread with great advice from alumni of this group—feel free to read through!

discussion_threads.title: Handling indoor recess in winter
discussion_threads.body: Midwest folks—how do you keep your sanity and students engaged during weeks of indoor recess?

discussion_threads.title: Snow days and pacing guides
discussion_threads.body: We’ve already had 5 snow days. How are you adjusting pacing without dropping key units?

discussion_threads.title: Best PD you’ve attended this year?
discussion_threads.body: Looking for recommendations for local or online PD that felt genuinely useful for new teachers.

discussion_threads.title: Classroom library ideas on a budget (old thread)
discussion_threads.body: Sharing older ideas about finding low-cost or free books for your classroom.

discussion_threads.title: NGSS-aligned labs for chemistry?
discussion_threads.body: Looking for lab ideas that emphasize modeling and data analysis rather than just ‘cool demos’.

discussion_threads.title: Phenomena to launch a unit on energy
discussion_threads.body: What anchoring phenomena are you using to kick off your energy units in physics or physical science?

discussion_threads.title: Warm-up routines that build number sense
discussion_threads.body: Share your favorite warm-ups that get students talking about math in the first 5 minutes.

discussion_threads.title: Helping students show their reasoning on state tests
discussion_threads.body: How do you build habits of explaining thinking when the test format is mostly multiple choice?

discussion_threads.title: Restorative conversations after office referrals
discussion_threads.body: What questions or structures are you using for restorative chats when students return from the office?

discussion_threads.title: Silent signals that actually work
discussion_threads.body: Share quick attention signals and transitions that don’t require raising your voice.

discussion_groups.title: New Teachers (0–3 Years) — National Community
discussion_groups.description: A large, supportive community for early-career teachers across all grade levels and subjects to share questions, wins, and resources.

discussion_groups.title: New Teachers (0–3 Years) — Midwest
discussion_groups.description: Regional group for early-career teachers in the Midwest to discuss local context, licensure, and school culture.

discussion_groups.title: High School Science PLC
discussion_groups.description: Professional learning community for high school science teachers collaborating on NGSS-aligned curriculum and assessments.

discussion_groups.title: Middle School Math Discussion Group
discussion_groups.description: Space for grades 6–8 math teachers to discuss tasks, routines, and ways to build mathematical thinking.

discussion_groups.title: Classroom Management Strategies (All Levels)
discussion_groups.description: Share concrete routines, relationship-building moves, and restorative practices for managing classrooms effectively.

discussion_groups.title: Inclusive Education K–12 Network
discussion_groups.description: Educators collaborating on co-teaching, accommodations, and universal design for learning across grade levels.

discussion_groups.title: Formative Assessment & Feedback Network
discussion_groups.description: Teachers sharing tools and strategies for gathering evidence of learning and providing meaningful feedback.

discussion_groups.title: Elementary STEM Teachers Collaborative
discussion_groups.description: K–5 teachers planning integrated STEM units, projects, and outdoor learning experiences.

discussion_groups.title: Technology Integration Cohort
discussion_groups.description: Educators exploring practical, student-centered ways to integrate technology into daily instruction.

discussion_groups.title: Veteran Teacher Mentors Roundtable
discussion_groups.description: A space for teachers with 10+ years of experience who mentor colleagues to discuss coaching strategies and leadership.
